description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-field-label` (T4-06) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-field-label/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, for prop typed, required prop typed, optional prop typed
2. Accessibility — renders as `<label>` with `for` attribute (not just visual label), required marker has visually-hidden text (not just "*" alone — WCAG 1.3.1), optional marker communicated to AT, axe-core pass
3. Tests — association to input via for, required/optional display, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — required, optional, associated to input
5. CSS — `--hx-*` typography tokens, required asterisk styling, CSS parts (label, required-indicator, optional-indicator)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable as form label

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-field-label/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-field-label — T4-06 antagonistic quality review
